name: Welo Data
whyFit: Useful short-term cash and AI-labeling context, but below long-term strategic skill level.
approach: Only pursue as bridge income while prioritizing RevOps/AI ops roles.
reviewSummary: Flexible remote work and easy onboarding; inconsistent task volume and limited growth.

name: shopware AG
whyFit: Strong company, but role is deeply infrastructure-engineering heavy.
approach: Skip unless a GTM/AI operations role appears.
reviewSummary: Generally strong engineering culture; role mismatch is the core issue.

name: Mitre Media
whyFit: These are deep senior engineering roles with heavy code/data stack expectations.
approach: Skip current roles; watch for RevOps/growth opportunities only.
reviewSummary: Stable technical environment but posting family is engineering-specialist.

name: Lemon.io
whyFit: Strong remote platform, but role expects true senior developer profile.
approach: Skip coding role and prioritize GTM/revenue operator paths.
reviewSummary: Good flexibility and startup exposure; high technical bar.

name: Nebulab
whyFit: Respected consultancy, but Shopify engineering role is not the right lane.
approach: Skip role; monitor for growth/partnership jobs.
reviewSummary: Positive engineering reputation; technical specialization required.

name: XXIX
whyFit: Design leadership role is not aligned to current operator profile.
approach: Skip and preserve energy for RevOps/GTM roles.
reviewSummary: Likely creative culture; role requires senior design portfolio depth.

name: Clipboard Health
whyFit: Operationally doable but may underuse strategic strengths.
approach: Only pursue if immediate stability is priority; otherwise target RevOps/GTM roles.
reviewSummary: Fast-paced ops environment with mixed workload feedback.

name: Rubric AI
role: GTM / AI Revenue Ops angle target
whyFit: High alignment with AI + RevOps + outbound systems strengths.
approach: Founder/Head of Growth outreach first; pitch AI revenue operating system results.
reviewSummary: Early-stage profile, limited formal review volume; prioritize direct signal via leadership outreach.
